title: News & Updates
description: Latest news, product releases, and company updates from Panasonic and LiTong

articles.title: Panasonic Expands FR Series Low-Impedance Capacitor Portfolio
articles.summary: Panasonic announces expansion of its popular FR series aluminum electrolytic capacitors with new voltage and capacitance combinations to meet growing demand for high-performance power supply applications.
articles.content:
Panasonic Corporation has announced a significant expansion of its FR series aluminum electrolytic capacitors, adding 15 new part numbers to meet the growing demand for high-performance power supply components. The expansion includes higher voltage ratings up to 100V and increased capacitance values up to 4700uF.

The FR series is renowned for its low impedance characteristics, making it ideal for switching power supply output filtering applications. The new additions maintain the series' excellent ripple current capability while providing designers with more options for their specific voltage and capacitance requirements.

Key highlights of the expansion include:

- New 100V rated parts for 48V and higher voltage power supplies
- Extended capacitance range from 10uF to 4700uF
- Maintained low ESR characteristics across all new values
- RoHS compliant and halogen-free construction
- Industry-standard case sizes for easy integration

LiTong, as an authorized Panasonic distributor, will stock the full range of FR series capacitors and provide technical support for designers integrating these components into their power supply designs.

articles.title: Panasonic Relays Excel in Motor Control Applications
articles.summary: New application note from Panasonic highlights best practices for using ALDP and DSP series relays in motor control applications, addressing common challenges with inductive load switching.
articles.content:
Panasonic has released a comprehensive application note detailing the use of their ALDP and DSP series electromechanical relays in motor control applications. The document addresses common challenges engineers face when switching inductive motor loads and provides practical solutions for reliable operation.

The application note covers:

- Proper relay sizing for motor inrush currents
- Contact material selection (AgSnO2 vs standard silver)
- RC snubber circuit design for arc suppression
- Thermal management considerations
- Expected electrical life under various load conditions

Case studies demonstrate how proper relay selection and protection circuits can extend contact life by 4-5x compared to unprotected standard relays. The document includes specific recommendations for HVAC, industrial automation, and appliance applications.

LiTong's FAE team is available to assist customers with relay selection and protection circuit design for their specific motor control requirements.

articles.title: LiTong Expands Panasonic Component Inventory
articles.summary: LiTong announces significant inventory expansion of popular Panasonic capacitor and relay series to improve lead times and support customer demand.
articles.content:
LiTong has announced a major expansion of its Panasonic component inventory, investing in strategic stock of high-demand capacitors and relays to better serve customer needs. The expansion focuses on popular series including FR and FS electrolytic capacitors, ECQ film capacitors, and ALDP power relays.

The inventory expansion includes:

- 50+ FR series capacitor values for immediate delivery
- Complete range of ALDP relay coil voltages
- Popular ECQ-E and ECQ-P film capacitor values
- Safety stock for long-lead-time automotive-grade components

This investment reduces typical lead times from 8-12 weeks to same-day or next-day shipping for stocked items. Customers can check real-time inventory availability through LiTong's online portal or by contacting their sales representative.

The expanded inventory supports LiTong's commitment to providing reliable supply chain services for Panasonic components across industrial, automotive, and consumer electronics markets.

articles.title: Panasonic Film Capacitors Power Renewable Energy Applications
articles.summary: Panasonic's ECQ-P polypropylene film capacitors are increasingly being adopted in solar inverter and wind power applications due to their long life and excellent AC performance.
articles.content:
Panasonic's ECQ-P series metallized polypropylene film capacitors are gaining significant traction in renewable energy applications, particularly in solar inverters and wind turbine power electronics. The capacitors' self-healing properties, low losses, and long operational life make them ideal for these demanding 20+ year lifetime applications.

Key advantages for renewable energy applications:

- Self-healing properties prevent catastrophic failures
- Low dissipation factor reduces heating and improves efficiency
- Excellent capacitance stability over temperature
- High voltage ratings up to 2000V DC
- Proven reliability in harsh outdoor environments

Solar inverter manufacturers are particularly interested in the ECQ-P series for DC link and snubber applications, where the capacitors' ability to handle high ripple currents and voltage transients is critical.

LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for renewable energy designers, including lifetime calculations, thermal analysis, and sample evaluation programs.

articles.title: Panasonic Updates AEC-Q200 Qualification for Capacitor Portfolio
articles.summary: Panasonic announces expanded AEC-Q200 qualification coverage for its automotive-grade capacitor portfolio, supporting growing EV and ADAS application demands.
articles.content:
Panasonic has announced expanded AEC-Q200 qualification coverage for its automotive-grade capacitor portfolio, strengthening its position as a leading supplier for electric vehicle and advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS) applications.

The updated qualifications include:

- Extended temperature range testing up to 150°C
- Enhanced vibration resistance for under-hood applications
- Additional humidity and thermal cycling tests
- Updated PPAP documentation packages

Newly qualified parts include select FR series capacitors for 125°C applications and expanded ECQ-P film capacitor values for DC link applications in EV powertrains.

These qualifications support the growing demand for high-reliability components in electric vehicles, where capacitors must withstand extreme temperatures, vibration, and long operational lifetimes.

LiTong's automotive FAE team can provide detailed qualification reports and assist with component selection for automotive applications.
